purpose: Keep Python/Bun kernels, subagents, reviewer models, RPC, and ACP callbacks inside the parent Grant boundary.
invariants: Nested callbacks preserve trace_id, work_node_id, and Grant scope.
A child callback cannot issue, widen, or transfer authority.
Nested calls count against the parent Grant budget and produce ordinary Action Receipts.
A callback after Grant revocation is denied even when the parent runtime session is still alive.
A nested reviewer is advisory; only the independent Broker verification gate can adopt an artifact.
